case_title: GRAVES, ROBERT vs. JACKSON, EVA AKA EVA KONG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAVES, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, EVA AKA EVA KONG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1135A PACIFIC AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAVES, ROBERT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, EVA AKA EVA KONG
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $206.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, EVA AKA EVA KONG
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAVES, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, EVA AKA EVA KONG DOES 1 TO 10 INCL SUMMONS ISSUED
